# R10M Generated By Us

- Winning ROAS: 2.52
- Angle: Big proof plus underdog national pride: over R10,000,000 generated by South Africans who were doubted, reframed as proof that doubters do not decide your future. Each variant keeps the proof and underdog spine while opening on a distinct emotion (pain, aspiration, story, curiosity, urgency, identity) and grounding everything in real DropStore proof only (R10,000,000+, R299, Janko, build-live), with the honest "best foundation, no guarantees" framing.
